# EIGEN AI — AI Text Humanizer & Detector

> EIGEN AI is a web app that helps students and writers detect AI-generated text and rewrite it into natural, human-sounding writing that passes major AI detectors (Turnitin, GPTZero, Copyleaks, Originality.ai). Sentence-level scoring shows exactly which sentences are flagged so users can target their edits.

Primary URL: https://eigentexthumanizer.com
Pricing page: https://eigentexthumanizer.com/pricing
Contact: caiyingzhengrey@gmail.com

## Core product pages

- [Humanize AI](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/humanize-ai): Rewrite ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini output into natural human writing.
- [AI Detector](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/ai-detector): Sentence-level AI detection with color-coded highlights.
- [ChatGPT Humanizer](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/chatgpt-humanizer): Specialist humanizer tuned for ChatGPT / GPT-4 / GPT-4o output.
- [ChatGPT Detector](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/chatgpt-detector): Check whether text was generated by ChatGPT.
- [Bypass Turnitin AI](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/bypass-turnitin-ai): Rewrite AI text to pass Turnitin's AI checker.
- [Bypass AI Detection](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/bypass-ai-detection): Universal bypass for Turnitin, GPTZero, Originality.ai.
- [Free Text Humanizer](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/free-text-humanizer): No-signup humanizer with a generous free tier.
- [AI to Human Text Converter](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/ai-to-human-text): Convert machine-sounding text to natural prose.
- [Pricing](https://eigentexthumanizer.com/pricing): Free, Basic, Pro, Max, and Daily Pass plans.

## How the product works

1. Paste text or upload a PDF / DOCX / TXT file (up to 30,000 characters on higher plans).
2. Run the AI detector — each sentence is scored for AI likelihood and color-coded.
3. One-click humanization rewrites only the flagged sentences, preserving the author's meaning.
4. Optional tone, perspective, and rephrasing controls let users match their own voice.
5. Re-scan to verify the output passes detection before submitting.

## Key features

- Sentence-level AI detection with color-coded highlights
- One-click humanization of flagged sentences only
- Tone controls: formal, casual, academic, conversational
- Perspective controls: first person, third person, active voice
- File upload: PDF, DOCX, TXT
- 99.2% reported pass rate across Turnitin, GPTZero, Copyleaks, Originality.ai
- No data retention — text is processed and discarded, never used for training

## Pricing (AUD)

- Free: 3 scans + 3 humanizations + 3 rewrites per day, 1,000 chars per input
- Basic ($9.99/mo): 10 scans + 30 humanizations + 30 rewrites per day, 8,000 chars per input
- Pro ($19.99/mo): 50 scans + 100 humanizations + 100 rewrites per day, 15,000 chars per input
- Max ($39.99/mo): 300 scans + unlimited humanizations + rewrites, 30,000 chars per input
- Daily Pass ($5.99): Pro-tier access for 24 hours, no subscription

## Target audience

- University and high-school students polishing AI-assisted drafts
- ESL writers using AI to scaffold writing before self-editing
- Content creators, marketers, and SEO writers
- Researchers and professionals who prototype with AI and want natural final copy

## Content policy

EIGEN AI exists to help users polish AI-assisted drafts into authentic, human-sounding writing. We do not endorse academic dishonesty. Users remain responsible for complying with their institution's AI-use policies.
